session.user: Run the following command and report results: ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py tests/commands/objective/test_plan_remote_paths.py
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff check command on those two files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check ruff linting on two files

session.assistant:
ruff passed: All checks passed!
Both files conform to ruff's linting standards: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/objective/test_plan_remote_paths.py`
